entity_resolution.reason: Input contains no stable, durable, personal, or factual information—only an idle acknowledgement ('lol ok sure whatever').

details: No memory cards generated because the input lacks durable content.

repair_options: Provide a specific stable fact or preference (e.g., 'My favorite color is blue' or 'I prefer text reminders over email').
Include relevant context and who/what the information is about so it can be resolved into entities.
